caption: A man with grey hair and glasses, wearing a dark blue suit jacket, a light-colored shirt, and a blue tie, speaks while gesturing with his hands. He is positioned in front of a pale green wall with a blurred doorway and door hardware visible in the background. A small headset microphone is attached to his cheek. Overlaid at the bottom of the scene is a graphic banner. In the first frame, the banner reads "MONGODB WORLD 2022", "#MDW22 | #theCUBE", and "theCUBE From the Javits Center, New York, NY". In the following three frames, the banner updates to identify the speaker as "DAVE VELLANTE Co-Founder & Co-CEO, SiliconANGLE Media, Inc. | @dvellante", while still including "theCUBE From the Javits Center, New York, NY". A "Sponsored By MongoDB" logo appears on the right side of the banner throughout the sequence. The man's facial expressions and hand positions shift slightly as he continues speaking.
